prompt: Enhance this slide's design to match the sleek, typical style often used in Google Slides.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, focusing on the content area of the presentation slide. Transform its design into a sleek, minimalist style characteristic of modern Google Slides templates. Retain all text content, including the main title 'For Ultra-High Concurrent Transactions', the two distinct content columns, and their respective bullet points. Re-style the 'TAKEAWAY' graphic in the bottom-left corner and the 'CS 145' identifier with page number '50' in the bottom-right corner to be consistent with a clean, professional aesthetic. Update the typography to a modern, readable sans-serif font (e.g., Roboto, Open Sans), optimizing font sizes and weights to establish clear visual hierarchy. Maintain the two-column layout with improved spacing and alignment, ensuring a clean, uncluttered presentation of information on a light background.
objects: Bullet points content for "Locking-based in-place updates"
Light background of the presentation slide
Two-column layout of the main content area
